title: ACC Distinguished Awards
description: ACC Distinguished Awards honor those who have made an indelible impact on the field of cardiology, recognizing clinicians, scientists and CV team members.

title: ACC Benevolence Fund
description: The ACC Benevolence Fund offers up to $1,500 to trainees facing unexpected financial hardship, with applications reviewed monthly.

title: Cleveland Clinic Global Scholars Award in India
description: This global scholars award supports early career clinicians in India with a research and clinical observership opportunity in the U.S.

title: Global Digital Health Award
description: Honoring global companies advancing care delivery with transformative digital health solutions.

title: Hani Najm Global Scholar Award
description: This observership program provides early career cardiologists in the Middle East and Africa the opportunity to shadow practicing clinicians at a U.S.-based hospital.

title: Thad and Gerry Waites Rural Cardiovascular Research Fellowship
description: This fellowship provides funding and opportunity for clinicians committed to reducing cardiovascular disparities in rural and underserved populations through research and community engagement.

title: Young Investigator Awards
description: The Young Investigator Awards competition provides a platform for early career investigators to showcase cutting-edge research at ACC Annual Scientific Session.

title: Douglas P. Zipes Distinguished Young Scientist Award
description: This award honors young physician-scientists who have contributed to science and are actively advancing research in basic or clinical cardiovascular fields.

title: William A. Zoghbi Global Research Initiative
description: This research award initiative provides a springboard for innovative new science that can improve cardiovascular care and outcomes in communities worldwide.
